title: New connectors in Claude for everyday life

sentences.text: Today we’re expanding what you can connect to Claude.
Alongside the work tools you already use, you can now connect the apps you use throughout your week, including AllTrails, Instacart, Audible, Tripadvisor, Intuit TurboTax, and more.

How people have been using connectors Since launching in July 2025, the Claude directory has grown to over 200 connectors, spanning popular apps for design, finance, productivity, and health used by millions of people every day.
We’ve found that people often connect multiple apps and use them together in a single conversation with Claude.
For example, a product manager will pull a query from Amplitude, turn it into a Canva deck, and drop the link into Asana for the team, all without leaving the conversation.
This expansion extends that functionality to more of the tools you use outside of work.

Starting today, Claude connects to AllTrails, Audible, Booking.com, Instacart, Intuit Credit Karma, Intuit TurboTax, Resy, Spotify, StubHub, Taskrabbit, Thumbtack, Tripadvisor, Uber, Uber Eats, and Viator, with more on the way.
Connectors dynamically show up in conversations We’ve also changed how connectors show up in conversations.
Claude now suggests the right app for what you’re doing, like finding a reservation, adding to a grocery cart, or identifying a flight.
It’s working from what you’ve told it: your preferences, your context, your conversation.
This all happens inside your conversation.
Ask Claude to recommend a weekend hike, and AllTrails will surface trails nearby that match your preferences.
You can then refine the recommendations by asking for something shorter, more scenic, or dog-friendly without leaving the thread.
When more than one connected app could help answer your question, Claude shows them all and lets you choose.
You control what you see and share Claude is ad-free and will stay that way.
There are no paid placements or sponsored answers in conversations with Claude.
When two connectors could help, you see both, ranked by what’s most useful to you.
Connecting a service gives Claude access to it on your behalf.
Your data from that app isn’t used to train our models, and the app doesn’t see your other conversations with Claude.
You can also disconnect it at any time.
Claude suggests connectors and makes recommendations.
But you stay in control of its actions: before it books or purchases something on your behalf, it’s designed to check with you first.
Getting started The more apps you connect, the more Claude can do.
Claude suggests relevant connectors as you work, which you can install with a click on desktop or a few taps on mobile.
Once connected, the service is available in every conversation.
Connectors are available on all plans, with mobile in beta.
See the full list at claude.ai/directory/connectors .
If you build a product that would be useful in Claude, submit it to our directory here .
For more information on getting started with connectors, along with security and privacy best practices when connecting data sources to Claude, visit our Help Center .

paragraphs.zh: 今天，我们正在扩展你可以连接到 Claude 的内容。除了你已经在使用的工作工具外，你现在还可以连接那些贯穿你一周日常使用的 app，包括 AllTrails、Instacart、Audible、Tripadvisor、Intuit TurboTax 等等。用户一直以来如何使用 connectors（连接器）自 2025 年 7 月推出以来，Claude directory 已增长到超过 200 个 connectors，涵盖设计、金融、生产力和健康等领域的热门 app，这些 app 每天被数百万人使用。我们发现，人们常常会连接多个 app，并在与 Claude 的一次对话中将它们配合使用。例如，一位 product manager（产品经理）会从 Amplitude 拉取一个查询，把它做成 Canva deck，再将链接放进 Asana 给团队，全程都无需离开对话。这次扩展将把这种功能延伸到更多你在工作之外使用的工具。从今天起，Claude 可连接 AllTrails、Audible、Booking.com、Instacart、Intuit Credit Karma、Intuit TurboTax、Resy、Spotify、StubHub、Taskrabbit、Thumbtack、Tripadvisor、Uber、Uber Eats 和 Viator，后续还会有更多加入。connectors 会动态出现在对话中 我们也改变了 connectors 在对话中的呈现方式。Claude 现在会根据你正在做的事情推荐合适的 app，比如查找预订、添加到 grocery cart（购物车），或识别航班。它依据的是你告诉它的信息：你的偏好、你的上下文、你的对话。这一切都发生在你的对话内部。让 Claude 推荐一次周末徒步时，AllTrails 会呈现附近符合你偏好的路线。然后你还可以继续细化推荐，比如要求更短一些、风景更好，或者对狗友好，而无需离开当前 thread（对话线程）。当不止一个已连接 app 能帮助回答你的问题时，Claude 会把它们都显示出来，并让你来选择。你可以控制自己看到和分享的内容 Claude 没有广告，而且会一直保持如此。在与 Claude 的对话中，不会有付费展示或赞助答案。当两个 connectors 都可能提供帮助时，你会同时看到它们，并按照对你最有用的程度排序。连接某项服务，就意味着你授权 Claude 代表你访问它。来自该 app 的数据不会用于训练我们的 models（模型），而该 app 也看不到你与 Claude 的其他对话。你也可以随时断开连接。Claude 会建议 connectors 并给出推荐，但你始终掌控它的操作：在它代表你完成预订或购买之前，其设计会先向你确认。开始使用 你连接的 app 越多，Claude 能做的就越多。Claude 会在你使用过程中推荐相关 connectors，你可以在 desktop（桌面端）上一键安装，或在 mobile（移动端）上轻点几下完成安装。连接完成后，该服务就能在每一次对话中使用。connectors 在所有套餐中均可用，mobile 目前处于 beta（测试版）。完整列表请见 claude.ai/directory/connectors 。如果你构建了一款适合在 Claude 中使用的产品，可以在这里提交到我们的 directory。想进一步了解如何开始使用 connectors，以及将数据源连接到 Claude 时关于安全和隐私的最佳实践，请访问我们的 Help Center。
